Class UwfEngineClient

java.lang.Object
ai.vextura.uwf_engine.UwfEngineClient
public class UwfEngineClient extends Object
Generated SDK client for WorkflowEngine. Auth, retry, and transport are handled automatically.

    Description

    Create a client backed by RIP endpoint resolution.

  • Constructor Details

    • UwfEngineClient

      public UwfEngineClient(String ripUrl, AuthProvider auth)
      Create a client backed by RIP endpoint resolution.
      Parameters:
      ripUrl - vex-config base URL, e.g. http://vex-config:9090

  • Method Details

    • withEndpoint

      public static UwfEngineClient withEndpoint(String endpoint, AuthProvider auth)
      Create a client that calls endpoint directly, bypassing RIP. Useful for local dev and smoke tests.

    • executeWorkflow

      public ExecutionResult executeWorkflow(ExecuteWorkflowInput req)
      ExecuteWorkflow — POST /api/v1/workflows/{workflowId}/execute
